title: No More Trials (NeoForge)
description: Disables Trial Chamber generation in new world chunks. Lightweight, no config needed, works server-side.
body:
What it does: Prevents new Trial Chambers from generating in any newly loaded chunk.
What it doesn't do: Remove existing chambers from already-generated chunks, or affect any items, blocks, or mobs from the Tricky Trials update — you can still craft, use, and encounter those normally.

Compatibility: NeoForge 1.21.1. Server-side only — clients don't need it installed.
